projects.name: Search & Information Discovery Systems
projects.summary: Deployed multi-stage retrieval, reranking, and analytics pipelines that power search and thematic discovery across millions of enterprise documents.
highlights: Improved topic discovery speed by up to 50% by combining transformer-based retrieval with metadata alignment and feedback loops.
Released internal libraries that standardised evaluation across 90+ models, enabling reproducible benchmarking for partner teams.
Built human-in-the-loop workflows that blend LLM agents and domain reviewers to refine recommendations and reporting.
projects.imageAlt: Abstract visualization of large-scale document retrieval.

projects.name: Generative AI for Simulation & Alignment
projects.summary: Designed diffusion, transformer, and evaluator stacks that generate realistic time-series scenarios for anomaly detection, forecasting, and what-if analysis.
highlights: Delivered 20% gains in enterprise search relevance by coupling LLM-guided retrieval with on-the-fly generation of topical summaries.
Introduced diffusion models for industrial time-series synthesis, creating millions of synthetic observations for stress testing.
Built LLM evaluation harnesses that blend prompt ensembling, rubric-guided scoring, and human alignment signals.

projects.name: Reliable Industrial AI
projects.summary: Integrated scientific priors into ML systems to maintain reliability for safety-critical simulations in chemical engineering, energy, and structural analysis.
highlights: Embedded physics and domain constraints into neural architectures to guarantee compliance with safety envelopes.
Improved predictive stability for weather and chemical process forecasting through hybrid statistical–deep learning ensembles.
Partnered with domain experts to define observability, testing, and rollback plans for regulated deployments.

projects.name: Evaluation & Trust in AI Systems
projects.summary: Operationalised large-scale human and LLM-based evaluation pipelines to benchmark generative models and retrieval systems.
highlights: Ran multi-annotator studies to stress-test automatic metrics and measure correlation with expert judgements.
Developed prompt-ensemble evaluators and calibration strategies that improve alignment with human scores.
Published reproducible evaluation protocols supporting new tasks and shared baselines.

projects.name: Production Systems at Scale
projects.summary: Scaled research prototypes into cloud-native products, including booking platforms, experimentation portals, and marketplace systems used across the university.
highlights: Launched user experiences that serve thousands of daily users with uptime SLAs and continuous delivery pipelines.
Created simulation backends generating synthetic datasets for quality assurance and regression testing.
Documented architectural patterns to help research teams operationalise their own prototypes.
